languages.text: "Экземпляр безвозвратно поврежден, Вольный Торговец. Конвульсивная активность конечностей и общая асинхронность движений не оставляет нам даже шанса для принятия гипотезы, гласящей, что некрон полностью функционален. Но он все еще бесконечно опасен, как и каждый из них".

"The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."
languages.original_text: "Экземпляр безвозвратно поврежден, Вольный Торговец. Конвульсивная активность конечностей и общая асинхронность движений не оставляет нам даже шанса для принятия гипотезы, гласящей, что некрон полностью функционален. Но он все еще бесконечно опасен, как и каждый из них".

"The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

languages.text: «Este espécimen ha sufrido daños permanentes, Comerciante Independiente. Las convulsiones de sus extremidades y sus movimientos asíncronos impiden creer en la hipótesis de que funciona perfectamente, pero sigue siendo una amenaza extrema, como el resto de su especie».
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: «Este espécimen ha sufrido daños permanentes, Comerciante Independiente. Las convulsiones de sus extremidades y sus movimientos asíncronos impiden creer en la hipótesis de que funciona perfectamente, pero sigue siendo una amenaza extrema, como el resto de su especie».

languages.text: “该样本已永久性损坏，行商浪人。肢体的痉挛与动作完全失调，足以否定‘该太空死灵功能完全正常’这一假设。尽管如此，它的危险程度丝毫没有下降。”
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: “该样本已永久性损坏，行商浪人。肢体的痉挛与动作完全失调，足以否定‘该太空死灵功能完全正常’这一假设。尽管如此，它的危险程度丝毫没有下降。”

languages.text: "Das Versuchsstück ist dauerhaft beschädigt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Seine konvulsive Muskelaktivität und asynchronen Bewegungen widerlegen die Hypothese, dass der Necron voll funktionsfähig ist. Er ist allerdings immer noch extrem gefährlich wie alle von ihnen."
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: "Das Versuchsstück ist dauerhaft beschädigt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Seine konvulsive Muskelaktivität und asynchronen Bewegungen widerlegen die Hypothese, dass der Necron voll funktionsfähig ist. Er ist allerdings immer noch extrem gefährlich wie alle von ihnen."

languages.text: « Ce spécimen est irréversiblement endommagé, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. L'agitation convulsive de ses membres et la désynchronisation totale de ses mouvements nous empêchent de partir du principe que le Nécron est pleinement opérationnel. Pour autant, il demeure terriblement dangereux, comme tous ses semblables. »
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: « Ce spécimen est irréversiblement endommagé, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. L'agitation convulsive de ses membres et la désynchronisation totale de ses mouvements nous empêchent de partir du principe que le Nécron est pleinement opérationnel. Pour autant, il demeure terriblement dangereux, comme tous ses semblables. »

languages.text: "Numune kalıcı olarak hasar görmüş Hür Tacir. Kasılmalı uzuv aktivitesi ve hareketin tamamen senkronizasyonunu kaybetmesi, Nekron'un tamamen işlevsel olduğu hipotezini benimsememizi engelliyor. Yine de hepsi gibi hâlâ son derece tehlikeli."
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: "Numune kalıcı olarak hasar görmüş Hür Tacir. Kasılmalı uzuv aktivitesi ve hareketin tamamen senkronizasyonunu kaybetmesi, Nekron'un tamamen işlevsel olduğu hipotezini benimsememizi engelliyor. Yine de hepsi gibi hâlâ son derece tehlikeli."

languages.text: 「この標本は永久に損傷しました。ローグトレーダー。痙攣する肢の動きと完全な動きの一致しない状態により、ネクロンの完全な機能を仮定することはできません。それでも、他のネクロンのように、非常に危険です。」
languages.original_text: "The specimen is permanently damaged, Rogue Trader. Convulsive limb activity and complete desynchronisation of movement prevent us from adopting the hypothesis that the Necron is fully functional. Nonetheless, it is still infinitely dangerous, like all of them."

traits.locale_text: 「この標本は永久に損傷しました。ローグトレーダー。痙攣する肢の動きと完全な動きの一致しない状態により、ネクロンの完全な機能を仮定することはできません。それでも、他のネクロンのように、非常に危険です。」
